description.overview: The Belgian Sheepdog (Groenendael) is an elegant, all-black herding dog known for its intelligence and versatility.
description.temperament: Belgian Sheepdogs are devoted, intelligent, and versatile. They bond closely with family and excel at various tasks.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia, epilepsy, and eye problems.
description.exercise: Very high energy. Need extensive daily exercise and mental challenges.

verdict.summary: Striking black herding dogs with exceptional intelligence. Belgian Sheepdogs are devoted and versatile but need experienced, active owners.
